title: xanthophyllum fragrans
intro: Xanthophyllum fragrans, also known as the fragrant Xanthophyllum, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae that is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum fragrans include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions or decoctions, and its leaves and stems are often dried and used in traditional remedies.
